title: lindernia rotundata
intro: Lindernia rotundata, also known as round-leaf lindernia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Lindernia rotundata is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
